title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — kube-scheduler-simulator.sigs.k8s.io/prescore-result
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
kube-scheduler-simulator.sigs.k8s.io/prescore-result
:
>-
{"InterPodAffinity":"success","NodeAffinity":"success","NodeNumber":"success","PodTopologySpread":"success","TaintToleration":"success"}
Used on: Pod
This annotation records the result of prefilter scheduler plugins, used by
https://sigs.k8s.io/kube-scheduler-simulator
.
